arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِصِدْقِ الْحَدِيثِ فَإِنَّ الْكَذِبَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْفُجُورِ
englishTranslation: Commit to truthfulness in speech, for indeed, lying leads to wickedness.
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral sa wax, ndax fen dafay sotti ci yoonu safara.
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجِٜrَلْ سَ وَخْ نْدَخْ فِنْ دَفَيْ سُتِّ سِ يُونُ سَفَرَ

arabicText: وَأَحْسِنُوا إِلَى الْجِيرَانِ وَاكْفُوا الْأَذَى عَنِ النَّاسِ كَافَّةً
englishTranslation: And show goodness to neighbors and withhold harm from all people.
wolofTranslationStandard: Defal baax sa jami dëkkandoo te bañ a loral jami nit ñi sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: دِفَلْ بَآخْ سَ جَمِ دِࣺكَّنْدُو تِ بَنْيْ اَ لُرَلْ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: إِنَّ الْأَخْلَاقَ الْحَسَنَةَ تَرْفَعُ قَدْرَ الصَّاحِبِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
englishTranslation: Indeed, good character elevates the status of its possessor in this world and the Hereafter.
wolofTranslationStandard: Jikko ju rafet dafay yékkati sa màkka ci àdduna ak àllaxira.
wolofalAjamiScript: جِكُّ جُ رَفِتْ دَفَيْ يِيكَّتِ سَ مَكَّ سِ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ

arabicText: فَكُنْ مُتَوَاضِعًا لِلَّهِ وَلَا تَسْعَ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا أبداً
latinTransliteration: Fakun mutawāḍi‘an lillāhi wa lā tas‘a fil-arḍi maraḥan abadā
englishTranslation: So be humble for Allah, and do not walk upon the earth with insolence ever.
wolofTranslationStandard: Nanga toroxlu ci sa Boroom te bul kowe sa bopp ci kaw suuf.
wolofalAjamiScript: نَنْجَ تُرُخْلُ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تِ بُلْ كَوِ سَ بُپْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِصِدْقِ الْحَدِيثِ فَإِنَّ الْكَذِبَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْفُجُورِ [5]
englishTranslation: Commit to truthfulness in speech, for indeed, lying leads to wickedness. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral sa wax, ndax fen dafay sotti ci yoonu safara. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجِٜrَلْ سَ وَخْ نْدَخْ فِنْ دَفَيْ سُتِّ سِ يُونُ سَفَرَ [5]

arabicText: وَأَحْسِنُوا إِلَى الْجِيرَانِ وَاكْفُوا الْأَذَى عَنِ النَّاسِ كَافَّةً [6]
englishTranslation: And show goodness to neighbors and withhold harm from all people. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Defal baax sa jami dëkkandoo te bañ a loral jami nit ñi sa sùnek. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِفَلْ بَآخْ سَ جَمِ دِࣺكَّنْدُو تِ بَنْيْ اَ لُرَلْ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سَ سُنِكْ [6]

arabicText: إِنَّ الْأَخْلَاقَ الْحَسَنَةَ تَرْفَعُ قَدْرَ الصَّاحِبِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ [7]
englishTranslation: Indeed, good character elevates the status of its possessor in this world and the Hereafter. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Jikko ju rafet dafay yékkati sa màkka ci àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: جِكُّ جُ رَفِتْ دَفَيْ يِيكَّتِ سَ مَكَّ سِ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [7]

arabicText: فَكُنْ مُتَوَاضِعًا لِلَّهِ وَلَا تَسْعَ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا أبداً [8]
latinTransliteration: Fakun mutawāḍi‘an lillāhi wa lā tas‘a fil-arḍi maraḥan abadā (8)

wolofTranslationStandard: Nanga toroxlu ci sa Boroom te bul kowe sa bopp ci kaw suuf. (Wers 8)

wolofTranslationStandard: Nanga toroxlu ci sa Boroom te bul kowe sa bopp ci kaw suuf. (Wers 32)
wolofalAjamiScript: نَنْجَ تُرُخْلُ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تِ بُلْ كَوِ سَ بُپْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [32]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِصِدْقِ الْحَدِيثِ فَإِنَّ الْكَذِبَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْفُجُورِ [33]
englishTranslation: Commit to truthfulness in speech, for indeed, lying leads to wickedness. (Stanza 33)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral sa wax, ndax fen dafay sotti ci yoonu safara. (Wers 33)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجِٜrَلْ سَ وَخْ نْدَخْ فِنْ دَفَيْ سُتِّ سِ يُونُ سَفَرَ [33]

arabicText: وَأَحْسِنُوا إِلَى الْجِيرَانِ وَاكْفُوا الْأَذَى عَنِ النَّاسِ كَافَّةً [34]
englishTranslation: And show goodness to neighbors and withhold harm from all people. (Stanza 34)
wolofTranslationStandard: Defal baax sa jami dëkkandoo te bañ a loral jami nit ñi sa sùnek. (Wers 34)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِفَلْ بَآخْ سَ جَمِ دِࣺكَّنْدُو تِ بَنْيْ اَ لُرَلْ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سَ سُنِكْ [34]

arabicText: إِنَّ الْأَخْلَاقَ الْحَسَنَةَ تَرْفَعُ قَدْرَ الصَّاحِبِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ [35]
englishTranslation: Indeed, good character elevates the status of its possessor in this world and the Hereafter. (Stanza 35)
wolofTranslationStandard: Jikko ju rafet dafay yékkati sa màkka ci àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 35)
wolofalAjamiScript: جِكُّ جُ رَفِتْ دَفَيْ يِيكَّتِ سَ مَكَّ سِ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [35]

arabicText: فَكُنْ مُتَوَاضِعًا لِلَّهِ وَلَا تَسْعَ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا أبداً [36]
latinTransliteration: Fakun mutawāḍi‘an lillāhi wa lā tas‘a fil-arḍi maraḥan abadā (36)
englishTranslation: So be humble for Allah, and do not walk upon the earth with insolence ever. (Stanza 36)
wolofTranslationStandard: Nanga toroxlu ci sa Boroom te bul kowe sa bopp ci kaw suuf. (Wers 36)
wolofalAjamiScript: نَنْجَ تُرُخْلُ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تِ بُلْ كَوِ سَ بُپْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [36]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِصِدْقِ الْحَدِيثِ فَإِنَّ الْكَذِبَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْفُجُورِ [37]
englishTranslation: Commit to truthfulness in speech, for indeed, lying leads to wickedness. (Stanza 37)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral sa wax, ndax fen dafay sotti ci yoonu safara. (Wers 37)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجِٜrَلْ سَ وَخْ نْدَخْ فِنْ دَفَيْ سُتِّ سِ يُونُ سَفَرَ [37]

arabicText: وَأَحْسِنُوا إِلَى الْجِيرَانِ وَاكْفُوا الْأَذَى عَنِ النَّاسِ كَافَّةً [38]
englishTranslation: And show goodness to neighbors and withhold harm from all people. (Stanza 38)
wolofTranslationStandard: Defal baax sa jami dëkkandoo te bañ a loral jami nit ñi sa sùnek. (Wers 38)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِفَلْ بَآخْ سَ جَمِ دِࣺكَّنْدُو تِ بَنْيْ اَ لُرَلْ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سَ سُنِكْ [38]

arabicText: إِنَّ الْأَخْلَاقَ الْحَسَنَةَ تَرْفَعُ قَدْرَ الصَّاحِبِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ [39]
englishTranslation: Indeed, good character elevates the status of its possessor in this world and the Hereafter. (Stanza 39)
wolofTranslationStandard: Jikko ju rafet dafay yékkati sa màkka ci àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 39)
wolofalAjamiScript: جِكُّ جُ رَفِتْ دَفَيْ يِيكَّتِ سَ مَكَّ سِ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [39]

arabicText: فَكُنْ مُتَوَاضِعًا لِلَّهِ وَلَا تَسْعَ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا أبداً [40]
latinTransliteration: Fakun mutawāḍi‘an lillāhi wa lā tas‘a fil-arḍi maraḥan abadā (40)
englishTranslation: So be humble for Allah, and do not walk upon the earth with insolence ever. (Stanza 40)
wolofTranslationStandard: Nanga toroxlu ci sa Boroom te bul kowe sa bopp ci kaw suuf. (Wers 40)
wolofalAjamiScript: نَنْجَ تُرُخْلُ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تِ بُلْ كَوِ سَ بُپْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [40]
